CrowdStrike Careers

About the role

We are looking for a Senior Detection Engineer to join our team. You'll be responsible for building and tuning detections across our endpoint platform.

Responsibilities

  • Build SIEM and EDR detections
  • Hunt for novel threats across customer environments
  • Document detection logic for the analyst team
  • Collaborate with product to improve detection coverage

Requirements

  • 5+ years in a SOC or detection engineering role
  • Deep familiarity with EDR telemetry
  • Comfort writing detection content in YARA, Sigma, or KQL
